log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:20+3=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:5+-2=3 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Gnome — Bardic Musician.
→ Javelin: [d20:11+6=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Gnome — Bardic Musician HP: 54/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Gnome — Bardic Musician (distant).
REASONING: No concentration active. 3 enemies. Recasting Hypnotic Pattern.
